<!-- Thanks for contributing to Beantr! Please read CONTRIBUTING.md first. -->

## Summary

What does this change and why?

Closes #<!-- issue number (required for anything beyond a trivial fix) -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `feat` — new capability
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` / `chore` — no behavior change

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to an issue above
- [ ] Branched from `develop` (or `main` for a hotfix), named `type/slug`
- [ ] `make validate` passes locally
- [ ] Docs updated (README / `docs/` / site) if behavior or positioning changed
- [ ] Kept Beantr dependency-free (no runtime services reintroduced)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
